use_cases: Switching between content sections without page navigation
Organizing dashboard sections in SaaS applications
Categorizing products or filters in e-commerce interfaces
Creating step-by-step forms or wizard flows
Segmenting settings or configuration options in admin panels
ai_summary: A tabbed navigation component from Coss.Com featuring an animated sliding indicator that supports both horizontal and vertical orientations. Offers two variants: a default pill-style with background and an underline style for a more minimal approach. Built with Base UI primitives and styled with Tailwind, providing smooth transitions and hover states for an accessible, polished tab interface.
